title: The Context Layer, Live — Atlan Activate 2026
summary: Atlan launches The Context Layer, Live at Activate 2026. New conversational search, data quality, agentic stewards features announced.

title: Introducing the Collibra AI Command Center
summary: Collibra launches the AI Command Center — a new product giving organizations 360° visibility and governance across all AI systems in heterogeneous environments. Launch webinar Apr 30 with live demo of new AI governance capabilities.

title: Data products — because agents need context
summary: Collibra co-founder Stijn Christiaens + MIT CISR researcher positioning data products as critical infrastructure for AI agents — arguing AI is only as effective as the data products it consumes. Direct signal of Collibra's catalog-as-AI-foundation strategy.

title: How to make your unstructured data AI-ready in minutes — Deasy Labs
summary: Collibra demonstrates Deasy Labs product: turns unstructured data into AI-ready datasets with context-rich metadata in a few clicks. Signals Collibra expanding catalog capabilities into unstructured data and AI-readiness — competing directly with Actian's data catalog positioning.
